title: Security Managers
description: Direct an organization's security functions, including physical security and safety of employees and facilities.

tasks.text: Develop budgets for security operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify, investigate, or resolve security breaches.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, direct, or coordinate security activities to safeguard company employees, guests, or others on company property.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or participate in emergency management and contingency planning.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Respond to medical emergencies, bomb threats, fire alarms, or intrusion alarms, following emergency response procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze and evaluate security operations to identify risks or opportunities for improvement through auditing, review, or assessment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Create or implement security standards, policies, and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess risks to mitigate potential consequences of incidents and develop a plan to respond to incidents.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise or provide leadership to subordinate security professionals, performing activities such as hiring, investigating applicants' backgrounds, training, assigning work, evaluating performance, or disciplining.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop, implement, manage, or evaluate policies and methods to protect personnel against harassment, threats, or violence.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop, recommend, or manage security procedures for operations or processes, such as security call centers, access control, and reporting tools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan security for special and high-risk events.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct threat or vulnerability analyses to determine probable frequency, criticality, consequence, or severity of natural or man-made disasters or criminal activity on the organization's profitability or delivery of products or services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct physical examinations of property to ensure compliance with security policies and regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor security policies, programs or procedures to ensure compliance with internal security policies, or applicable government security requirements, policies, and directives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate security operations or activities with public law enforcement, fire and other agencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor and ensure a sound, ethical environment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Write or review security-related documents, such as incident reports, proposals, and tactical or strategic initiatives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Communicate security status, updates, and actual or potential problems, using established protocols.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train subordinate security professionals or other organization members in security rules and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or manage investigation programs, including collection and preservation of video and notes of surveillance processes or investigative interviews.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare reports or make presentations on internal investigations, losses, or violations of regulations, policies and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend meetings, professional seminars, or conferences to keep abreast of changes in executive legislative directives or new technologies impacting security operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Purchase security-related supplies, equipment, or technology.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop, arrange for, perform, or assess executive protection activities to reduce security risks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review financial reports to ensure efficiency and quality of security operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop, conduct, support, or assist in governmental reviews, internal corporate evaluations, or assessments of the overall effectiveness of facility and personnel security processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Support efforts to reduce substance abuse or other illegal activities in the workplace.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
